creator: freebsd@centromere.net
text:
On Wayland, Signal Desktop only renders if `~/.config/Signal` does not exist.

➜  ~ pkg info signal-desktop
signal-desktop-5.56.0_1
Name           : signal-desktop
Version        : 5.56.0_1
Installed on   : Mon Oct  3 11:03:49 2022 EDT
Origin         : net-im/signal-desktop
Architecture   : FreeBSD:13:amd64

➜  ~ pkg info wayland
wayland-1.21.0
Name           : wayland
Version        : 1.21.0
Installed on   : Mon Jul 18 21:51:34 2022 EDT
Origin         : graphics/wayland
Architecture   : FreeBSD:13:amd64

➜  ~ freebsd-version
13.1-RELEASE-p2
